title: coffea lancifolia var. lancifolia
intro: Coffea lancifolia var. lancifolia, a lesser-known variant of the Coffea genus, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to Madagascar. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its caffeine content, which has been traditionally used to treat fatigue, headaches, and fever. The health benefits of Coffea lancifolia var. lancifolia include improved mental alertness, increased energy, and enhanced cognitive function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for memory and focus. Coffea lancifolia var. lancifolia can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of jet lag, improve mood, and promote overall well-being.
